docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $525.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BOVASTRO, ANTHONY P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
